title: Oscar, the playful pup, is looking for a loving home
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Oscar, a four-month-old crossbreed, is a lively and affectionate young dog in search of a family to call his own.


> This handsome boy is available for adoption from the Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA) after being surrendered by his previous owners in Willowmore some time ago.


"When he first arrived, Oscar was frightened, severely underweight, and timid," says GRSPCA's Sam Trietsch.

However, with the care and dedication of the SPCA team, he has blossomed into a confident and lovable pup with a big personality. Now, he’s ready to start a new chapter in a home where he will be cherished and appreciated.

If you are interested in giving Oscar the loving home he deserves, please contact the Garden Route SPCA.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
